author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Six One Indie Showcase 2026
The Six One Indie Showcase aims to offer promotional opportunities to indie developers that may not have the means to highlight their games within the traditional showcase ecosystem of the industry. What began as a small DIY passion project has blossomed into a professionally produced premiere presentation for independent games.

Each Showcase features never-before-seen world premieres, digital showcase debuts, and exclusive news from indie developers and publishers from across the globe. Once the Showcase ends, audiences are able to delve deeper with developer interviews, hands-on previews, and the Six One Indie Showcase Steam Event featuring discounts and demos from participants.

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Warhammer Skulls Showcase Livestream (May 2026)
Tune in on May 21st for Warhammer Skulls Showcase starting at 9am PT. The annual showcase for Warhammer video games fans, features world premieres, new announcements, news and reveals for a huge range of games and titles. 

Actor, writer, director and Warhammer 40,000: Boltgun 2 Battle Sister herself, Alanah Pearce, is in the hosting chair for our anniversary bash.

Expect to see news from Space Marine 2, Darktide, Rogue Trader, Dark Heresy, Boltgun 2, Warhammer Survivors, Dawn of War IV, and lots more. 

Follow our curator page on steam:
https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Warhammer 40K: Dawn Of War 4 - Official Release Date And Content Roadmap Reveal Trailer
Check out this trailer for Warhammer 40,000: Dawn Of War 4 that premiered during the Warhammer Skulls Showcase 2026!

Just announced at Warhammer Skulls 2026, Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War IV launches on September 17th, 2026!

Return to the RTS series’ roots with deeply satisfying strategy gameplay. Take command of four unique Warhammer 40,000 factions, including the Adeptus Mechanicus in their series debut! Fight through 70+ epic campaign missions, as well as the replayable Last Stand, Skirmish and multiplayer modes.


#warhammer40k #warhammer #gaming #gameplay

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Black Flag Resynced - 20 Minutes Of New Gameplay
We got hands on with Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced for the first time to check out a brand new mission, new dialogue, underwater environments and the updated combat system. Check out the timestamps below for more details.

Timestamps: 
0:00 Intro
0:10 New Diving Bell Acquisition Mission 
1:39 Crouching and Stealth Gameplay
2:16 Combat and Assassination
3:34 Sail to Blackbeard
4:40 Cutscene with Thatch, Edward and Bonnet
5:56 New Underwater Gameplay
10:26 Another Cutscene with Thatch and Bonnet
12:18 Helping Thatch defend the Stede
13:37 New Combat Gameplay
16:34 Helming a Boat and Naval Combat
19:03 Boarding Enemy Boat
19:43 Cutscene with Outro

#assassinscreed #blackflag #gaming #gameplay

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced Might Be Adding As Many Problems As It’s Fixing - Preview
I walked away from the three-hour preview demo of Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced feeling mixed on what's changed with the remake, especially the story. 

In the demo, I played through three parts of Edward's story: the first hour, about an hour of the open world, and then two story missions from about halfway into Edward's story, one of which was brand-new. The other mission existed in the original game, but it now includes a brand-new section. 

#assassinscreed #blackflag #preview #gaming #gameplay 

Presented by: Crunchyroll
https://www.crunchyroll.com/
